title: Bedventory
description: This mod was made for ModFest: Singularity. It is supposed to open the Inventory when going to sleep instead of opening the Chat. Who uses that in bed anyway?
body:
![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/205d3985-13ee-4a9d-9b3c-4c924ca628d4)

This mod was made for ModFest: Singularity. It is supposed to open the Inventory when going to sleep instead of opening the Chat. Who uses that in bed anyway?
